basic_details.job_title: TISS Senior Research Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree (minimum 55%) in Social Sciences / Analytics / Sustainability / Health-related fields, M.Phil or equivalent research degree with thesis work, Minimum 2 years' experience in research or academic project roles
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree (minimum 55%) in Social Sciences / Analytics / Sustainability / Health-related fields. M.Phil or equivalent research degree with thesis work. Minimum 2 years' experience in research or academic project roles.

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting Virtual Interview via Zoom
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download TISS Senior Research Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS SENIOR RESEARCH OFFICER recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the TISS SENIOR RESEARCH OFFICER position is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the SENIOR RESEARCH OFFICER post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree (minimum 55%) in Social Sciences, Analytics, Sustainability, or Health-related fields, along with an M.Phil or equivalent research degree with thesis work.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for this role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of experience in research or academic project roles is required to be eligible for the SENIOR RESEARCH OFFICER position at TISS.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the SENIOR RESEARCH OFFICER position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the SENIOR RESEARCH OFFICER post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 65,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the TISS SENIOR RESEARCH OFFICER recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 125/- for SC/ST candidates. Women candidates are exempt from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online application, followed by shortlisting of candidates. The final stage is a virtual interview conducted via Zoom.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: The job type for the SENIOR RESEARCH OFFICER position at TISS is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Mumbai apply?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Mumbai, Maharashtra. While the application is online, candidates should be prepared to attend virtual interviews and potentially work from the specified location.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the SENIOR RESEARCH OFFICER post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the SENIOR RESEARCH OFFICER position announced in this recruitment drive by TISS.
